Reliable repair, maintenance, and improvement services.

We help homeowners and property owners with practical repairs, ongoing maintenance, and straightforward improvement work in Cleveland, Tennessee and surrounding areas.

Text communication is preferred. If you are contacting us about a project, completing the service request form is the best way to send the details.

Request Service Best way to send project details. Project Center Sign in to view project information.
Call or text 304-582-0759
Text preferred
Email Robert@Ketter.us
Service Area Cleveland, TN and surrounding areas

Services

We focus on practical work, clear communication, and dependable follow-through.

General Repairs

Drywall, trim, doors, fixtures, hardware, minor plumbing repairs, and everyday household fixes.

Property Maintenance

Ongoing maintenance for homeowners, landlords, and rental properties to keep things running smoothly.

Installations

Appliance hookups, fixtures, shelving, hardware, and other basic home installation projects.

Interior Improvements

Small upgrades that improve function, appearance, and value without overcomplicating the process.

Rental Turnover Work

Punch-list items, touch-ups, repairs, and readying properties for new tenants.

Custom Requests

Have a project in mind? Send the details and we will let you know if it is a good fit.

Why work with us

  • Clear communication
  • Dependable scheduling
  • Practical solutions
  • Quality workmanship

How to contact us

Text is usually the fastest way to reach us.

Clients can choose the contact method that works best for them, but completing the service request form is highly encouraged when sending project details.

Call or text: 304-582-0759

Email: Robert@Ketter.us

Service area: Cleveland, TN and surrounding areas
